steps.t: The Orcs dwell near the mountains to the north-west of Penda's camp. Penda has requested a search for evidence of his campmate's presence among the te…
Frithstan is bound to a pole among the Orc-tribe in the western Wailing Hills. Speaking with Frithstan may reveal the fate of the missing Rohirrim.
There is a crate near Frithstan in the western Orc-encampment. Frithstan would you like to search the nearby crate for a set of keys.
Frithstan remains bound in the western Orc-encampment in the Wailing Hills. You have found the keys that he has asked you to look for.
